creator: luisaevans84@gmail.com
text:
As a Yahoo user, you should know how to create a new Yahoo email account, and you need to follow the steps below. These are the simple ones; by using these, here are the step you can follow to create yahoo mail account:
•	First, go to your browser open Yahoo.com.
•	Now click on the Signup button.
•	Now fill up your basic information to create a Yahoo account type your basic information- Name, age, gender, date of birth.
•	At last, you need to click on the Continue button to create a Yahoo account.
If you cannot do so, you can connect to the customer care of the instruction.
If you failed to do so, you could connect to technical support for help and fix your issue.
https://www.yahoosupport.co/blog/yahoo-mail-create-account-easily-and-effectively/
